rationale: Hard pass on direct adaptation: the archetype is a word/crossword satisfaction hook with warm food-themed palette (browns, greens, yellow), which clashes with Bounce Blast 3D's dark moody 3D physics aesthetic and tells the wrong gameplay story — players clicking through expect letter tiles, not block-placement chain reactions, creating a major bait-and-switch / IPM risk. Audience overlap is the only redeeming factor (casual 25-55 puzzle players skew similar), so if anything, only borrow the "satisfying completion + chain payoff" emotional beat and rebuild it natively around block placement → ball bounce cascades. Do not whitelist this archetype as-is.
